subject: Wire pipeline_viewer wants_exit through to simulator
description: Add virtual wants_exit() in pipeline_viewer.hpp, override in KanataViewer/OoOKanataViewer/MultiCoreOoOKanataViewer/ClarityViewer/MultiCoreClarityViewer, expose pipeview_wants_exit() in TraceController, poll in Simulator::run(). Replaces std::exit(0) cleanly.
